title: Fantômas
overview: Paris, 1914: Fantomas, a master of deception and chaos, is being chased by Lieutenant Juve as he investigates a series of violent crimes that have put the city on edge. In an era of violence and political tensions, Lieutenant Juve finds himself hunting for a man with no motive, no agenda, no pattern or identity.

title: Somnambule
overview: Adam is a sleepwalker: as soon as he falls asleep, his personality completely changes... and he does crazy things. One morning, upon waking up, he sees Estelle, his boss's daughter, tied up in his bathroom. He has no memory of what happened. Pursued by the police, he must solve this mystery to avoid ending up in prison.

title: Untitled Original Judd Apatow Comedy
overview: A country western star experiences a dramatic downfall and must navigate their career in free fall.

title: Remain
overview: Architect Tate Donovan arrives in Cape Cod to design a client’s summer home. Struggling with the loss of his family, he moves into a historic home where he meets Wren, a mysterious young woman who challenges Tate’s perception of the world.

title: Ice Age: Boiling Point
overview: A dinosaur-and-lava-filled madcap adventure that takes Manny, Sid, Diego, Ellie, Scrat and the rest of the herd to visit never-before-seen corners of the treacherous Lost World.

title: CoComelon: The Movie
overview: A CG-animated film inspired by the blockbuster children’s show of the same name. Plot TBA.

title: S/H/V
overview: Four students, who make money by putting stolen school items online, are hired to steal a VHS tape from their Physical Education Teacher’s Office. However, things take a turn for the worse, when they find dozens of tapes, and being kids, they dare each other to partake in watching them.

title: Sonzai no Subete o
overview: A gripping human mystery following a journalist who uncovers a shocking truth behind a long-unsolved kidnapping case that spanned decades.

title: At Your Service
overview: A young mother and a police officer who finds herself in a predicament when deciding who to save - her family, her career, or herself.

title: Untitled Ataraxia Sequel
overview: Ever since the storm subsided and the aberrations it birthed withered into the ruins, the Impact Zone has been closely monitored - its horrors believed contained. But when strange infections begin appearing beyond the Impact Zone's borders, it becomes clear that the nightmare is far from over...

title: The Wandering Earth III
overview: The sun is about to be destroyed, and humans have built huge thrusters on the surface of the earth to find a new home. However, the road to the universe is full of dangers. In order to save the earth, young people from the wandering earth era stepped forward for the third time and started a life-and-death battle against time.

title: Triple Bluff
overview: Sequel to the 2024 film Double Bluff. Plot TBA.

title: Children of Liberty
overview: New York, 1941, shortly before the US enters the war. Stevie Mayer is an intelligent twelve-year-old who’s father suddenly disappears after being chased by two threatening men. Alone and unprotected, Stevie is left with a mysterious suitcase that everybody wants and nobody is who they claim to be. Thrown headlong into a mind-twisting plot, Stevie begins to suspect that his father is part of ring of Nazi spies. With the help of Miriam, a young Jewish refugee in his class, Stevie attempts to unravel the puzzle that leads to an explosive conclusion. It is a tale of non-stop adventure and a budding young love.

title: K-Pop Superstar
overview: A young Korean-American woman defies her family's wishes to compete in a televised competition to find the next K-pop girl group.

title: Queen of France
overview: 11th century Russia. Grand Prince Yaroslav the Wise betroths his favorite daughter Anne to Henry I, King of the Franks, and sends her across Europe to her future husband. Warrior Ostromir, former mercenary who previously served the Byzantine Emperor, is charged with guarding the princess on a long dangerous journey. Along the way, Anne and Ostromir fall in love with one another.

title: Emily in Emily
overview: Blogger Emily goes on vacation in search of likes and new followers, but instead finds true love. However, keeping love is much harder than finding it, because you have to sacrifice something. What will Emily choose: a platinum button or new love?

title: Bhoyongkar Shundor
overview: Raja Roy Chowdhury (Kakababu)'s next adventure.

title: The Nightingale
overview: The lives of two French sisters are torn apart by the onset of World War II.

title: The Brothers Gruff go on a Holiday
overview: Brothers Gruff decide to have the holiday of a lifetime, but they run into big problems when their dream hotel turns out to be run by a troll who would rather eat his guests!

title: Broman
overview: Broman and his band of sidekicks fight an elusive threat

title: War and Peace
overview: The love story of young Countess Natasha Rostova and Count Pierre Bezukhov is interwoven with the Great Patriotic War of 1812 against Napoleon's invading army.

title: Panic Carefully
overview: Described as a paranoid thriller about a hunt for a cyber-terrorist in the vein of Mr. Robot and The Silence of the Lambs.

title: Athos 2643
overview: In the distant future, in a monastery on the lonely Neptune moon of Athos, a mysterious crime unfolds. An artificial intelligence responsible for life support comes under suspicion of murder. An inquisitor specializing in artificial intelligence is sent to solve this mysterious case.

title: The Hollow Season
overview: In the remote mountain town of Graven Hollow, autumn is more than just a season — it’s a warning. Every thirteen years, as the harvest moon rises and the leaves turn blood-red, the town prepares for a ritual it dares not speak aloud. When a group of college friends arrives for the annual fall festival, they’re drawn into a chilling legend about the Hollow Man — a masked figure born of fire and betrayal, who returns to collect a blood debt. As the friends unravel the town’s secrets and fight to survive, they discover that tradition runs deep… and some roots are soaked in horror.

title: Wafflehead
overview: Two documentarians settle into a small town and persuade a few hillbilly locals to help them find the sole survivor of a massacre.

title: Live Like That
overview: Based on an inspiring story about a family whose faith is tested by an unimaginable loss, and what they choose to do next, in the midst of grief, they make a surprising decision. Instead of responding with anger, they choose forgiveness and set out to help heal a divided community. What begins as private heartbreak becomes a broader movement of hope and connection, showing how faith, love, and unity can bring light even to the darkest moments.

title: Mico 45/45
overview: Plot TBA. Described as portrait of a young adult from Northeastern Brazil searching for meaning in the life around him and within himself.

title: Dorian Gray, or Narcissus Through the Looking Glass
overview: Dorian Gray is but a boy, yet he's worshipped as a God - by the closeted painter who immortalized his beauty, by the libertine who taught him all of the world's secret pleasures, and by himself. For the next one hundred years, Dorian Gray falls into a rabbit-hole of debauchery, remaining forever young while his portrait pays the price for each of his sins. But when crimes of decades past come back to haunt him, and the novelty of everlasting youth starts taking its toll, can his soul still be redeemed?
